prompt: A cinematic film-still aesthetic collage. A glowing, warm full moon hangs in a dark night sky, partially obscured by the dark silhouette of detailed bamboo or pine branches. Below, a young man with dark, curly hair wears an oversized off-white knit sweater. He is captured in candid poses-looking away and then looking up with closed eyes- under soft, warm streetlights near a quiet body of water. The overall tone is moody, nostalgic, and lo-fi with a slight grainy texture and muted earth tones.
